name: github_delete_user_copilot_space
description: Delete a Copilot Space for a user (DELETE /users/{username}/copilot-spaces/{space_number}). Returns HTTP 204. See [Delete a Copilot Space for a user](https://docs.github.com/en/rest/copilot-spaces/copilot-spaces?apiVersion=2026-03-10#delete-a-copilot-space-for-a-user).
